# Deployed Product Manual Capture Notes

Status: pending manual capture.

URL: `https://www.typeduck.hk/web/`

This side of the M21 protocol must be captured manually. Do not automate or scrape the deployed site. Before transcribing outputs, record:

- browser and date/time,
- observed product engine/dictionary/build version if visible,
- fresh userdb confirmation, such as a private/incognito session with site data cleared,
- schema/profile and dictionary comparability,
- settings for completion, correction, auto-composition, input memory, combine/separate, prediction never-first, prediction threshold, simplification, full-shape, ASCII mode, and page size.

After those confounders are pinned, transcribe each corpus input into `product-cases.json` and add screenshots as `screenshot-product-<case>.png`.
